heading: Prohibition on restriction of installation of renewable fuel pumps
label: 2807 Prohibition on restriction of installation of renewable fuel pumps
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the date that is 1 day after , see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Dec. 19, 2007section 1601 of Pub. L. 110–140section 1824 of Title 2

children.label: A
children.text: at least 85 percent of the volume of which consists of ethanol; or

children.label: B
children.text: any mixture of biodiesel and diesel or renewable diesel (as defined in regulations adopted pursuant to section 7545() of title 42 (40 CFR, part 80)), determined without regard to any use of kerosene and containing at least 20 percent biodiesel or renewable diesel.o

children.label: A
children.text: a franchise under this chapter; and

children.label: B
children.text: any other contract or directive of a franchisor relating to terms or conditions of the sale of fuel by a franchisee.

children.label: A
children.text: installing on the marketing premises of the franchisee a renewable fuel pump or tank, except that the franchisee’s franchisor may restrict the installation of a tank on leased marketing premises of such franchisor;

children.label: B
children.text: converting an existing tank or pump on the marketing premises of the franchisee for renewable fuel use, so long as such tank or pump and the piping connecting them are either warranted by the manufacturer or certified by a recognized standards setting organization to be suitable for use with such renewable fuel;

children.label: C
children.text: advertising (including through the use of signage) the sale of any renewable fuel;

children.label: D
children.text: selling renewable fuel in any specified area on the marketing premises of the franchisee (including any area in which a name or logo of a franchisor or any other entity appears);

children.label: E
children.text: purchasing renewable fuel from sources other than the franchisor if the franchisor does not offer its own renewable fuel for sale by the franchisee;

children.label: F
children.text: listing renewable fuel availability or prices, including on service station signs, fuel dispensers, or light poles; or

children.label: G
children.text: allowing for payment of renewable fuel with a credit card,

children.heading: Effect of provision
children.label: 2 Effect of provision
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to preclude a franchisor from requiring the franchisee to obtain reasonable indemnification and insurance policies.

children.heading: Exception to 3-grade requirement
children.label: c Exception to 3-grade requirement
children.text: No franchise-related document that requires that 3 grades of gasoline be sold by the applicable franchisee shall prevent the franchisee from selling a renewable fuel in lieu of 1, and only 1, grade of gasoline.
